messages.content:
I can’t run the repository’s load test task from here, and I don’t have enough context to know what “task 17” maps to in your project.

If you want, send:
- the task definition for 17, or
- the command/config used to run load tests

and I can help you figure out the exact command or interpret the results. If you’re expecting me to change or trigger project code, please submit again with a concrete coding request or turn off Chat-only mode.

nextActions.label: Continue chat
nextActions.description: Ask a follow-up question in the same thread.
